localised.en: Make sure the information you have given is correct.
localised.cy: Gwnewch yn siŵr bod yr wybodaeth a roddwyd gennych yn gywir.

localised.en:
##Now send your form

You need to submit your form on the next screen.

Before you do this you can [print or save a PDF copy of your answers (opens in a new window or tab)]({0}).
localised.cy:
##Nawr anfonwch eich ffurflen

Mae angen i chi gyflwyno’ch ffurflen ar y sgrin nesaf.

Cyn i chi wneud hyn gallwch [argraffu neu gadw copi PDF o’ch atebion (yn agor ffenestr neu dab newydd)]({1}).

localised.en: Do you want to add another?

setLiteralNumber = if number = 1 then 10 else 20
literalSetNumber = if 1 = number then 10 else 20
setLiteralString = if string = ''FOO'' then 10 else 20
literalSetString = if ''FOO'' = string then 10 else 20
calculationSetLiteralNumber = amount + setLiteralNumber
calculationLiteralSetNumber = amount + literalSetNumber
calculationSetLiteralString = amount + setLiteralString
calculationLiteralSetString = amount + literalSetString
